name: Kami no Ko
description: The protagonist who turns from a sociopathic child into more and more of a Messiah.

name: Kanata Futaki
description: __Height:__ 163 cm Kanata is a girl at Riki's school and is the public morals chairman. She is often seen chasing after Haruka, who is a well-known trouble maker. To help Kanata, Kudryavka offered up her two dogs Strelka and Belka to patrol the school grounds and help in hunting down Haruka when she causes trouble. ~!She is Haruka's twin sister, though this is only revealed later. She acts extremely cold to Haruka, although it is later revealed she is forced to treat Haruka coldly by her family

name: Kei Iura
description: Deputy director of the Nokyo Kabaddi club, a brain sect with excellent analytical skills. At first glance, he looks like a gentle Yasa man, but his back face is cunning, and he takes measures like a half-threatening attempt to get Yogoe into the Kabaddi club. He has been in Kabaddi for 6 years.

name: Kenji Koiso
description: A math-savvy 17-year-old high school student and a moderator of the interactive computer world OZ along with his close friend Takashi Sakuma. Kenji is less skilled in dealing with people. Kenji is invited by his friend Natsuki Shinohara for Sakae Jinnouchi's 90th birthday. After receiving a cryptic code on his cell phone and cracking it, he becomes a primary suspect for hacking into OZ. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kirie Sakurame
description: Number 9 of UQ Holder's immortal squad, Numbers. She is an extremely wealthy girl and the main financial sponsor of the organization. Kirie has the power to rewind time, averting adverse events like her own death by returning to specific instants in time she marks with what she labels as "save points". She also has the power to bring other people to the save point with her, having them remember the erased events as well.

name: Kouichirou Oota
nativeName: オオタ・コウイチロウ
description: Ota is the main teacher of the school and later the second-in-command of Exelion, the spaceship used as headquarters for missions in space. Ota completely trusts Noriko and her skills that will allow her to pilot the Gunbuster, an extremely powerful robot able to effectively contrast the aliens. Moreover, Ota was one of the crewmen of Noriko's father's ship; during the unlucky battle in which he died, admiral Takaya refused the last chance of escaping and let Ota go instead. name: Kyouko Shirayuki
description: Kyoko Shirayuki, also known as the Kyoto's Missile Lady (京都のミサイルレディー, Kyōto no Misairuredi), is an A-Rank Keijo player, affiliated with the Kansai's Kyoto Branch. Her mentor was Sanae Kirieda. She becomes Hanabi Kawai's mentor after Hanabi officially becomes a Keijo player.

name: Lang
description: Lang lived with his younger brother Diol and mother Mido in a cottage in the countryside for most of his adolescent life. In his adulthood, he enlisted in the Mezarte Kingdom as a soldier and later rose to the ranks of Commander.
